tool.name: Trackastra model installer
tool.command:
#set $data_table = $__app__.tool_data_tables.get('trackastra_models') #if $data_table is not None and len($data_table.get_fields()) > 0: #set $known_models = ','.join([row[0] for row in $data_table.get_fields()]) #else: #set $known_models = '' #end if
#if $model_source.source == 'upstream': python '$__tool_directory__/fetch_models.py' '$output_file' --known-models '$known_models' --models '$model_source.models' #else: python '$__tool_directory__/fetch_models.py' '$output_file' --known-models '$known_models' --archive '$model_source.archive' --value '$model_source.value' --dimensionality '$model_source.dimensionality' --model-version '$model_source.model_version' #end if

param.name: source
param.label: Model source
param.option: Model ZIP supplied by the administrator

param.name: models
param.label: Models to install
param.option: ctc (2D/3D Cell Tracking Challenge model, release 0.3.0)

param.name: archive
param.label: Trackastra model ZIP
param.help: ZIP containing exactly one model directory with model.pt, config.yaml, and train_config.yaml.

param.name: value
param.label: Model identifier
param.help: Stable identifier used in workflows and the Galaxy model table.

validator.message: Use only letters, numbers, dot, underscore, plus, and hyphen.
Use only letters, numbers, dot, underscore, plus, and hyphen.

tool.help:
This data manager installs Trackastra model directories into the ``trackastra_models`` Galaxy tool-data table.
For the two upstream models, downloads occur only when an administrator runs this data manager. Ordinary Trackastra analysis jobs then use the cached model directory without network access. Administrators may also install a complete custom model ZIP.
